name: Schaeffler India Limited
summary: Schaeffler India Limited is a leading industrial and automotive supplier in India, manufacturing a wide range of precision components and systems for engine, transmission, and chassis applications, as well as rolling and plain bearings. The company serves automotive and industrial sectors with its product portfolio including ball bearings, cylindrical roller bearings, spherical roller bearings, and tapered roller bearings. Schaeffler India Limited is headquartered in Pune, India.
